mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.exam_name AS examName, a.exam_paper_id AS examPaperId, b.index_name AS kemuValue, d.real_name AS teacherName, a.start_time AS startTime, a.end_time AS endTime, a.duration, c.exam_paper_myscore AS examPaperScore, a.status, a.allow_retake AS allowRetake, a.max_retake_count AS maxRetakeCount, er.exam_record_uuid_number AS examRecordUuidNumber, er.insert_time AS examRecordInsertTime, er.total_score AS totalScore, er.status AS examRecordStatus, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_details ed LEFT JOIN exam_question eq ON ed.exam_question_id = eq.id WHERE ed.exam_record_id = er.id AND eq.exam_question_types = 5 AND (ed.review_status = 0 OR ed.review_status IS NULL) ) AS pendingReviewCount FROM exam_info a LEFT JOIN dictionary b ON a.kemu_types = b.code_index AND b.dic_code = 'kemu_types' LEFT JOIN exam_paper c ON a.exam_paper_id = c.id LEFT JOIN teachers d ON a.teacher_id = d.id LEFT JOIN exam_record er ON er.exam_info_id = a.id AND er.users_id = #{req.usersId} AND er.id = ( SELECT MAX(id) FROM exam_record WHERE exam_info_id = a.id AND users_id = #{req.usersId} AND IFNULL(is_latest, 1) = 1 )
AND a.status > 0
AND a.kemu_types = #{req.kemuTypes}
AND a.exam_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.examName}, '%')
ORDER BY a.start_time ASC
